series_metadata.series_description: Legislator’s office staff or the legislator him/herself will call with a tax question or complaint on behalf of their constituents. This includes Corr Trax Correspondence, inter-office memorandums and all other correspondence to taxpayers. File is kept alphabetically by subject.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months after the document has been scanned. ; Electronic: Retain 8 years or until Legislator leaves office, whichever comes sooner., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
